div.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; padding: 24px; border-radius: 12px 12px 0 0;
background: white; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-top: none; border-radius: 0 0 12px 12px;
div.p: Your EMIS portal account has been created. You can use it to access your information.

div.style: background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; margin: 16px 0;

div.p: Please log in at the portal and change your password on first login.
If you did not expect this email, please contact your school administrator.
